items.title: Roberto Martinez resigns from Portugal as Cristiano Ronaldo’s ex-manager is lined up as replacement after World Cup exit
items.summary: ROBERTO MARTINEZ has resigned as the Portugal manager following the team's World Cup exit. The Portuguese were beaten 1-0 by Spain after a last-minute goal by Mikel Merino. An emotional Martinez said: "It's true that this is my last game for the Portuguese National Team..." He then thanked the Portu

items.title: Man City star Ruben Dias storms out of interview after Portugal’s World Cup defeat to Spain
items.summary: MANCHESTER CITY ace Ruben Dias STORMED OUT of his post-match interview during a bizarre presser following Portugal's World Cup elimination. Cristiano Ronaldo and co crashed out of the last-16 following a 1-0 loss to Spain thanks to Arsenal ace Mikel Merino's last-gasp winner at the AT&T Stadium

items.title: Ronaldo bows out and Martinez steps down as Spain beat Portugal
items.summary: Spain laboured to an uninspiring 1-0 victory over Iberian rivals Portugal in their last-16 tie to set up a quarter-final meeting with the winners of USA vs Belgium.

items.title: Balogun starts for USA as De Bruyne, Doku benched for Belgium LIVE!
Spain into quarter-finals after Merino's late winner against Portugal
items.summary: Spain leave it late as super-sub Mikel Merino scores a stoppage-time winner to send his side into the quarter-finals, ending Cristiano Ronaldo's hopes of World Cup glory.

items.title: Mikel Merino comes full circle with Spain in touching tale of fathers and sons | Sid Lowe
items.summary: Having battled back from injury to make the World Cup, the matchwinner’s goal was a deserved payoff for unsung sacrifices And then, suddenly, there was Mikel Merino circling the corner flag again, another marvellous moment to emulate his father Ángel Miguel and embrace his son Marco. items.title: Thomas Tuchel’s worried reaction as he fears John Stones has suffered injury in England dressing room celebrations
items.summary: JOHN STONES hilariously fooled Thomas Tuchel with a fake injury during England's dressing room celebrations in Mexico City. items.title: Harry Kane reveals he has his voice back after ‘all-timer of an interview’ following England’s World Cup win over Mexico
items.summary: HARRY KANE admits he has loved seeing everyone crack up at his croaky-voiced interview after England's stunning win over Mexico. items.title: Why European backlash over Trump intervention won't worry Infantino
items.summary: After 10 years as Fifa president, could the Folarin Balogun controversy tip the balance against Gianni Infantino? Don't bet on it.

items.title: Fifa release statement on Folarin Balogun’s overturned World Cup ban and hit back at Uefa over ‘crossed red line’ claim
items.summary: DESPERATE Fifa are scrambling to avoid a legal threat to boot the USA out of the World Cup - by trying to justify the Folarin Balogun red card U-turn. The World Cup organizers have come under fire after the decision to let Balogun play in Monday's last-16 game. USA striker Balogun was sent off again

items.title: Folarin Balogun handed HUGE fine for controversial red card despite it being suspended by Fifa at World Cup
items.summary: FOLARIN Balogun has been hit with a HUGE fine by Fifa after his red card controversy. The USA striker was sent off against Bosnia in the round of 32 last week. But his red card was controversially suspended after an intervention by President Donald Trump. Balogun is free to play in the last-16 clash
